apis.name: systemShare.ShareController
apis.purpose: 分享面板控制器，用于准备分享数据、配置预览模式、拉起系统分享面板

apis.name: systemShare.SharedData
apis.purpose: 封装分享数据记录，支持文本/链接/文件/图片等多类型数据

apis.name: systemShare.SharedRecord
apis.purpose: 分享数据记录，包含 utd、content/uri、title、description、thumbnail 等字段

apis.name: systemShare.ShareControllerOptions
apis.purpose: 分享控制器配置项，配置预览模式、选择模式、锚点信息等

apis.name: systemShare.getSharedData
apis.purpose: 从目标应用 want 中解析出分享数据

apis.name: systemShare.getContactInfo
apis.purpose: 从目标应用 want 中解析出意图框架推荐联系人信息

apis.name: systemShare.getWant
apis.purpose: 基于 SharedData 和预览模式构造 want 数据，用于自定义分享流程

apis.name: systemShare.ShareController.on('dismiss')
apis.purpose: 注册分享面板关闭事件监听

apis.name: systemShare.ShareController.on('shareCompleted')
apis.purpose: 注册用户完成分享事件监听，获取分享渠道信息

apis.name: harmonyShare.on('knockShare')
apis.purpose: 注册设备轻贴（碰一碰）分享事件监听

apis.name: harmonyShare.on('gesturesShare')
apis.purpose: 注册隔空传送（抓取握拳）事件监听

apis.name: harmonyShare.on('dataReceive')
apis.purpose: 注册沙箱接收事件监听（仅文件类型数据）

apis.name: harmonyShare.SharableTarget.share
apis.purpose: 跨端发送分享数据（从 SharableTarget 回调调用）

apis.name: harmonyShare.ReceivableTarget.receive
apis.purpose: 沙箱接收文件并保存至指定目录

notableFindings: No @ohos.share API exists; the actual import module is @kit.ShareKit with two namespaces: systemShare and harmonyShare
UIExtensionAbility is referenced in systemShare via ShareAbilityResultCode return values, but its definition lives in Ability Kit docs, not in Share Kit
Share Kit is the kit name (@kit.ShareKit), not an individual API symbol
systemShare requires Stage model only, API version >= 4.1.0(11); harmonyShare requires API version >= 5.0.0(12)
SharedData supports up to 500 records, total data size must not exceed IPC limit of 200KB
